# AgentStack.im

AgentStack.im provides OpenClaw setup services for Isle of Man businesses.

## Core offer
- OpenClaw setup in 48 hours
- Local machine setup
- Hosted VM setup
- Team setup and handover documentation

## Pricing (GBP)
- Local machine setup: £699
- Hosted VM setup: £999
- Team setup (up to 5 users): £1,299
- Optional monthly retainer: Lite £149/month, Pro £299/month

## Ideal customers
- Founders and small teams adopting OpenClaw
- Businesses needing practical AI operations setup and workflow automation

## Lead capture
- Primary call to action: Book setup call
- Lead form fields: name, business email, business name, preferred setup, biggest goal

## Trust and delivery
- Isle of Man-focused service
- Security-first setup
- Clear fixed pricing
- Optional ongoing support

## Canonical page
- https://agentstack.im/

## Contact route
- Website lead form (preferred)
